Policies & Compliance

Corporate Policies

Consult our corporate policies. These documents reflect our commitment to labor well-being, safety and equal opportunities.

Privacy Policy

At CallDom del Caribe ("we", "our" or "CallDom del Caribe"), we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy describes how we collect, use, disclose and protect your information.

Policy sections

Information we collect

We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email, phone and company when you contact us through our website or use our services. We also automatically collect technical and usage information when you visit our website.

How we use your information

We use your information to provide and improve our services, communicate with you, comply with legal obligations and protect our rights and interests.

Information sharing

We do not sell your personal data. We share information with service providers who help us operate our business, under confidentiality agreements.

Security

We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, disclosure or destruction.

Your rights

You have the right to access, correct, delete or restrict the processing of your personal data. You can exercise these rights by contacting us at info@calldomdelcaribe.com.

Changes

We may update this policy occasionally. We will post any changes on this page with an updated effective date.

Corporate Policies

1. Workplace Harassment Prevention Policy

Framework for preventing, detecting and managing workplace harassment situations.

2. Emergency Response Policy

Plan for emergency preparedness, response and incident management across the organization.

3. Occupational Health & Safety Management System

Guidelines and standards for the health and safety management system.

4. Alcohol and Other Substances Policy

Standards for preventing and managing alcohol and drug use in the workplace.

5. Sexual Harassment Prevention Policy

Measures to prevent and address sexual harassment in the work environment.

6. Remote Work Policy

Regulations and guidelines for telework and hybrid work modalities.

7. Gender Equality & Labor Equity Policy

Commitment to equal opportunities and labor equity with a gender perspective.

8. Mental Health Policy

Promotion of psychological well-being and prevention of mental health risks at work.

9. Right to Disconnect Policy

Guarantee of employees' right to disconnect outside working hours.

Contact

For questions about this policy, contact: info@calldomdelcaribe.com
